title: How Accepting Bitcoin for Ebook Sales Works and How to Set It Up Today for Digital Creators
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: As a digital creator in a restricted country like Nigeria, trying to sell an ebook online without PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip can be a nightmare. You've likely been blocked or have to endure high fees. But what if you could accept Bitcoin for ebook sales and get paid instantly, without any banking limitations or KYC requirements? That's exactly what we'll show you today.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

It's because traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe often have restrictive policies, blocking transactions from certain countries or requiring users to verify their identity. But with the right tools, you can bypass these limitations and accept payments directly from your buyers. Using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin eliminates the need for intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe, allowing you to keep more of your hard-earned money.
What You Need Before You Start

Pricing digital products in crypto is simpler than most creators expect. You set your price in USD. The Web3 Wallet Connect module pulls live exchange rates from price feeds and displays the equivalent amount in whatever coin the buyer chooses — Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, Solana, or 300 more options. The buyer always pays the USD equivalent at the time of transaction. NOWPayments handles the currency conversion accounting. You receive the crypto equivalent of your USD price in your wallet. For USDT-priced products, there is no conversion at all — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus network fees that typically amount to less than one percent of the transaction.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, you'll need to integrate a payment processor like NOWPayments with your digital store platform. Once you've integrated the payment processor, you can configure your store to accept Bitcoin payments. You'll also need to set up an automated delivery system that can send your ebook to customers once they've made a payment. With the right tools, you can automate this process and make it seamless for both you and your customers.
Don't let PayPal or Stripe hold you back from selling your ebooks – use cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin to bypass their limitations.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, it's time to go live and start selling your ebook. To do this, you'll need to create a listing for your ebook on your digital store platform and configure the payment settings to accept Bitcoin. You can then share the listing with your audience and start promoting your ebook. When someone makes a payment, your automated delivery system will send the ebook directly to their email address, making the entire process smooth and hassle-free.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once your digital store is up and running, you can start scaling your ebook sales by promoting your store and listing to a wider audience. You can use social media, online communities, and email marketing to reach more potential customers and drive traffic to your store. With the right tools and strategy, you can significantly increase your ebook sales and build a loyal customer base.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

Can I sell ebooks without using PayPal or Stripe? Yes, you can sell ebooks using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, which doesn't require any intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe. This method works by integrating a payment processor like NOWPayments with your digital store platform and setting up an automated delivery system to send ebooks to customers once they've made a payment.
With the right tools, you can automate your payment and delivery pipeline, making it seamless for both you and your customers.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for more ways to sell digital products without fees, you might also want to check out our Web3 Wallet Connect, which allows buyers to pay in Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, SOL, and 300+ other coins. With this tool, you can create a seamless payment experience for your customers and increase your sales. You can also set up a digital store using our Shop platform at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling ebooks using Bitcoin, follow these steps: Create a listing for your ebook on your digital store platform and configure the payment settings to accept Bitcoin. Integrate a payment processor like NOWPayments with your store to handle cryptocurrency payments. Set up an automated delivery system to send ebooks to customers once they've made a payment. Promote your store and listing to a wider audience using social media, online communities, and email marketing. Optimize your store for conversions to increase your ebook sales.
Scaling your ebook sales is easier than you think – promote your store and listing to a wider audience and watch your sales increase.
